$description: Declarative registry of FlipClaw workarounds for known upstream OpenClaw bugs. Each entry records: the affected version range, the fix version (or null if still broken), the artifacts FlipClaw installs as a workaround, an optional runtime probe to verify the upstream fix is actually present, and documentation metadata. apply-upstream-patches.sh reads this file on every install and update, compares against the installed OpenClaw version, and installs or removes workarounds accordingly.

dreaming-cron-reconciler.title: memory-core reconciler removes managed dreaming cron on gateway restart
dreaming-cron-reconciler.verification_notes: In 4.9, reconcileShortTermDreamingCronJob reads config from api.config at gateway:startup hook time, which is empty, so the reconciler interprets dreaming as disabled and wipes the managed cron. In 4.10, a new startupCfg path reads the config from the startup event payload first, falling back to api.config only if that fails.

cron_jobs.name: Restore Dreaming Cron After Restart
cron_jobs.description: Workaround for OpenClaw 2026.4.x bug where memory-core reconciler removes managed dreaming cron on gateway startup. Runs scripts/ensure-dreaming-cron.sh shortly after the nightly restart to recreate the managed cron if missing.
cron_jobs.system_event_template: Memory dreaming cron health check after nightly restart. Run: exec {{WORKSPACE}}/scripts/ensure-dreaming-cron.sh

runtime_probe.description: Verify a managed Memory Dreaming Promotion cron exists after gateway start
runtime_probe.command: openclaw cron list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Memory Dreaming Promotion'

wiki-bridge-zero-artifacts.title: wiki bridge listArtifacts returns empty even with indexed memory content
wiki-bridge-zero-artifacts.verification_notes: Source inspection showed the listArtifacts call chain is byte-identical between 4.9 and 4.10. Runtime test on a clean 4.10 container with 5 memory artifacts on disk confirmed the bridge discovers and imports all of them: 'Bridge: enabled (5 exported artifacts)'. The fix likely lives in config/agent-list resolution outside the direct listArtifacts path. Source inspection was a false negative — runtime verification caught the real behavior. REGRESSION: In 2026.4.11 listArtifacts() returns 0 artifacts again. The wiki bridge workaround is now re-activated with an automated daily ingest script.

cron_jobs.name: Wiki Daily Ingest Workaround
cron_jobs.description: Workaround for OpenClaw wiki bridge listArtifacts() regression in 2026.4.11. Ingests daily logs, dreaming reports, and core memory into the wiki via openclaw wiki ingest since the bridge auto-population is broken.
cron_jobs.system_event_template: Wiki daily ingest workaround. Run: exec {{WORKSPACE}}/scripts/wiki-daily-ingest.sh --workspace {{WORKSPACE}}

runtime_probe.description: Verify wiki bridge reports >0 exported artifacts with at least one memory file on disk
runtime_probe.command: openclaw wiki status 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'Bridge: enabled \([1-9][0-9]* exported'
